description: Add real-time notification system with email and push channels

sub_tasks.name: contracts
sub_tasks.description: Shared interfaces, DTOs, and entities for the notification system. Defines INotificationService, INotificationChannel, NotificationDto, NotificationEntity, and ChannelType enum.
acceptance_criteria: INotificationService interface defined with Send and GetHistory methods
INotificationChannel interface defined with Deliver method
NotificationDto and NotificationEntity created with validation
ChannelType enum: Email, Push, InApp
Unit tests for domain validation rules pass

sub_tasks.name: email-channel
sub_tasks.description: Email notification delivery via SMTP. Implements INotificationChannel for email with template support and retry logic.
acceptance_criteria: Implements INotificationChannel for ChannelType.Email
Sends email via configured SMTP settings
Supports HTML email templates
Retry logic for transient SMTP failures
Integration test with test SMTP server passes

sub_tasks.name: push-channel
sub_tasks.description: Push notification delivery via Firebase Cloud Messaging. Implements INotificationChannel for push with device token management.
acceptance_criteria: Implements INotificationChannel for ChannelType.Push
Integrates with Firebase Cloud Messaging API
Device token registration and cleanup
Integration test with FCM mock passes

sub_tasks.name: notification-api
sub_tasks.description: REST API endpoints for sending notifications and querying notification history. Wires channels via DI.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/notifications endpoint sends to specified channel
GET /api/notifications/history returns paginated history
Proper auth on all endpoints
422 for invalid channel type, 400 for bad input
Integration tests for all endpoints pass

sub_tasks.name: notification-ui
sub_tasks.description: Notification bell icon with dropdown showing recent notifications. Includes real-time updates via SignalR.
acceptance_criteria: Notification bell component with unread count badge
Dropdown shows last 20 notifications with timestamps
Real-time updates via SignalR hub
Mark as read on click
Responsive design (mobile + desktop)
E2E test for notification flow passes
